points.text: CellCentric raised $220M in Series D funding to advance inobrodib, an oral p300/CBP inhibitor for multiple myeloma, which is being tested in combination with bispecific antibodies including Pfizer's Elrexfio and Johnson & Johnson's Tecvayli.
The global Bi-Specific MAb market is projected to reach $21.83 billion by 2030, driven by expanding therapeutic applications and competitive landscape strategies.

Aclaris Therapeutics reported positive full top-line Phase 1a results for ATI-052, an anti-TSLP/IL-4Rα bispecific antibody, showing an estimated half-life of ~45 days enabling up to three-month dosing intervals.

Shattuck Labs advanced SL-325, a DR3 blocking antibody, with Phase 1 enrollment complete and Phase 2 in Crohn's disease planned for Q3 2026, while initiating IND-enabling activities for a new DR3/TL1A bispecific antibody.

Aclaris Therapeutics selected lichen planus as the lead indication for ATI-2138, an oral ITK/JAK3 inhibitor, while advancing Phase 1b trials for its bispecific ATI-052 in asthma and atopic dermatitis.
UCB signed a definitive agreement to acquire Candid Therapeutics for $2 billion upfront plus up to $200 million in milestones to secure cizutamig, a bispecific T-cell engager targeting BCMA and CD3.

Cizutamig is a bispecific antibody designed to enable T-cell-mediated cytotoxicity against BCMA-expressing plasma cells while limiting cytokine release, currently evaluated in over 100 patients across 10 autoimmune indications.

Novelty Nobility expanded its manufacturing agreement with AGC Biologics to advance NN4101, a bispecific antibody targeting neovascular retinal diseases, into GMP production at AGC's Chiba, Japan facility.
Zahra Mahmoudjafari (University of Kansas Health System) highlighted at the 2026 ICE-T Congress that novel bispecific antibodies are bridging care gaps for rural patients in hematologic oncology.

Partner Therapeutics received an FDA Commissioner's National Priority Voucher for zenocutuzumab-zbco (Bizengri), a first-in-class bispecific antibody targeting HER2 and HER3, for NRG1 fusion-positive cholangiocarcinoma.

Zenocutuzumab demonstrated a 37% overall response rate and 58% clinical benefit rate in the phase 1/2 eNRGy trial for advanced NRG1-positive cholangiocarcinoma, supporting the regulatory priority designation.

Prerna Mewawalla, MD, presented at the 2026 National ICE-T Conference on the landscape of bispecific antibodies in multiple myeloma, highlighting cevostamab's potential to address gaps for patients progressing on BCMA and GPRC5D-directed therapies.

CellCentric — Inobrodib — Multiple Myeloma — Phase 2 study ongoing; planned Phase 3 trial supported by $220M Series D; combination regimen includes bispecific antibodies (Pfizer's Elrexfio, J&J's Tecvayli).

Bi-Specific MAb Market — Market Research Report 2026 — Global Oncology and Immunology — Market valued at $21.83 billion with forecasts extending to 2035F; report analyzes competitive landscape and strategic opportunities.

Aclaris Therapeutics — ATI-052 — Th2-driven inflammatory diseases (Asthma, Atopic Dermatitis) — Phase 1a healthy volunteer trial met primary endpoints with ~45-day half-life and complete/sustained CCL17 inhibition; Phase 2b program planned Q4 2026.
Shattuck Labs — SL-325 — Crohn's Disease — Phase 1 trial enrollment complete; Phase 2 initiation expected Q3 2026; IND-enabling activities commenced for a novel DR3/TL1A bispecific antibody.

UCB — Candid Therapeutics Acquisition — Autoimmune/Inflammatory Diseases — $2 billion upfront payment agreed; deal includes up to $200 million in milestones; closing expected Q2–Q3 2026 pending anti-trust clearance.
Candid Therapeutics — Cizutamig — Autoimmune Diseases — Bispecific BCMA x CD3 T-cell engager; clinical evaluation in >100 patients; active in >10 autoimmune indications.

Novelty Nobility — NN4101 — Neovascular retinal diseases — Expanded manufacturing deal with AGC Biologics to transition bispecific antibody program from cell line development to GMP production at Chiba, Japan facility.

Hematologic Oncology Field — Bispecific Antibodies — Multiple Myeloma/Lymphoma/Leukemia — Shifting from innovation to implementation with focus on outpatient models and community-based administration to improve access.

Partner Therapeutics — Zenocutuzumab-zbco (Bizengri) — NRG1 fusion-positive cholangiocarcinoma — FDA granted Commissioner's National Priority Voucher based on phase 1/2 eNRGy trial data showing 37% ORR and 9.2-month median PFS.

Cevostamab — Multiple Myeloma — FcRH5-targeting bispecific antibody demonstrated deep minimal residual disease (MRD)-negative responses in heavily pretreated, relapsed/refractory patients who had received prior BCMA-directed therapy.
CellCentric — Late-stage financing for oral epigenetic therapy — Inobrodib — $220M Series D secured; evaluating combination with bispecific antibodies (Elrexfio, Tecvayli) for multiple myeloma.
Research and Markets — Bi-Specific MAb market intelligence — Global bi-specific antibody sector — Released 2026 report detailing $21.83B market size, trends, and competitive strategies through 2035F.

Aclaris Therapeutics — Bispecific antibody development and oral inhibitor expansion — ATI-052 (anti-TSLP/IL-4Rα bispecific) + ATI-2138 (ITK/JAK3 inhibitor) — Phase 1b trials ongoing in asthma/AD; Phase 2b basket study in lichen planus planned.

Shattuck Labs — DR3 pathway targeting via monoclonal and bispecific formats — SL-325 (DR3 blocker) + novel DR3/TL1A bispecific — Phase 1 data expected Q2 2026; Phase 2 Crohn's trial Q3 2026; bispecific IND-enabling activities active.
UCB — Inorganic growth strategy via T-cell engager platform — Cizutamig (acquired from Candid) — $2 billion acquisition to expand pipeline in severe immune-mediated diseases.
Candid Therapeutics — Bispecific T-cell engager development — Cizutamig + multi-specific TCE pipeline — Acquired by UCB; lead asset targets BCMA and CD3 for autoimmune indications.

Novelty Nobility — Clinical-stage bispecific antibody development — NN4101 — Partnered with AGC Biologics for GMP manufacturing in Japan to support process scalability for neovascular retinal disease indication.

AGC Biologics — CDMO capacity expansion for complex biologics — NN4101 manufacturing — Leveraging Chiba facility and planned Yokohama site to support mammalian expression and single-use bioreactor technologies for bispecific programs.

Partner Therapeutics — Commercialization of first-in-class bispecific antibody — Zenocutuzumab-zbco (Bizengri) — Secured FDA National Priority Voucher for NRG1+ cholangiocarcinoma indication; phase 1/2 eNRGy trial reported 37% ORR and 58% CBR.

Cevostamab developers — Advancing FcRH5-targeting bispecific antibody strategy — Cevostamab — Positioned to treat multiple myeloma patients refractory to BCMA and GPRC5D cellular therapies based on deep MRD-negative response data.

Inobrodib — Mechanism: Oral p300/CBP dual inhibitor — Phase: 2 (planned Phase 3) — Population: Multiple myeloma patients — Comparator: N/A (combination study) — Endpoints: Evaluated in all-oral regimen with bispecific antibodies (Elrexfio, Tecvayli).

Bi-Specific MAb — Mechanism: Dual-target binding for enhanced efficacy — Phase: Market analysis covers various clinical stages — Population: Oncology and immunology indications — Data: Report identifies key trends and strategic opportunities in the $21.83B market.

ATI-052 — Mechanism: Dual inhibition of TSLP and IL-4Rα — Phase: 1a (completed) / 1b (ongoing) — Population: Healthy volunteers (1a); Asthma and Atopic Dermatitis patients (1b) — Endpoints/Results: ~45-day half-life; complete/sustained CCL17 inhibition; dose-proportional PK/PD.

Shattuck Bispecific (Unnamed) — Mechanism: Dual inhibition of DR3/TL1A axis and secondary target — Phase: IND-enabling — Population: Inflammatory and immune-mediated diseases — Endpoints/Results: Entered IND-enabling activities; designed to inhibit DR3/TL1A plus another biologically relevant target.

Cizutamig — Mechanism: Bispecific BCMA x CD3 T-cell engager inducing cytotoxicity against plasma cells — Phase: Clinical (multiple studies) — Population: Multiple myelum and autoimmune disease patients (n>100) — Comparator: Not specified — Results: Designed to limit cytokine release while maintaining cytotoxicity.

NN4101 — Mechanism: Bispecific antibody targeting neovascular retinal diseases — Phase: Pre-clinical/Process development (GMP transition) — Population: Neovascular retinal disease patients — Comparator: Not specified — Status: Advanced to GMP manufacturing via AGC Biologics partnership.

Bispecific Antibodies — Mechanism: Dual-targeting cellular engagement — Phase: Clinical implementation — Population: Multiple myeloma, lymphoma, leukemia patients — Context: Positioned as alternatives to CAR-T for rural access and earlier-line use.

Zenocutuzumab — Mechanism: Bispecific antibody inhibiting HER2 and HER3 to block NRG1-mediated signaling — Phase: 1/2 (eNRGy) — Population: Advanced unresectable or metastatic NRG1 fusion-positive cholangiocarcinoma — Comparator: None (single-arm) — Results: 37% ORR (95% CI 16%-62%), 58% CBR, 9.2-month median PFS, 7.4-month median DOR.

Cevostamab — Mechanism: FcRH5-targeting bispecific antibody — Phase: Investigational — Population: Relapsed/refractory multiple myeloma patients post-BCMA and GPRC5D therapy — Endpoints: Deep minimal residual disease (MRD)-negative responses observed in heavily pretreated cohorts.

CellCentric — Secured $220M Series D round led by Venrock — Inobrodib — Funding allocated to Phase 2 completion and Phase 3 initiation; strategic positioning includes combination with bispecific antibodies.

Novelty Nobility / AGC Biologics — Manufacturing agreement expansion — NN4101 — Deal advances bispecific antibody program to GMP production at AGC's Chiba, Japan facility; reflects growing demand for complex biologics manufacturing in Asia-Pacific.
UCB / Candid Therapeutics — Acquisition of clinical-stage biotech — Cizutamig (bispecific TCE) — $2 billion upfront; up to $200 million in milestones; expected close Q2–Q3 2026.

Partner Therapeutics — Regulatory milestone — Zenocutuzumab-zbco (Bizengri) — FDA awarded Commissioner's National Priority Voucher, reducing review timeline from 10-12 months to 1-2 months for NRG1 fusion-positive cholangiocarcinoma.
